meta-description: Learn about accreditation by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Accreditation
excerpt: If a Marketplace health plan is approved, this is the “seal of approval” given to the plan by an independent organization to show that the plan meets national quality standards.
content: If a Marketplace health plan is approved, this is the “seal of approval” given to the plan by an independent organization to show that the plan meets national quality standards.
